concerns.text: T015 (Enhanced detail compositing) and T016 (Reduced detail manipulation) are marked [P] (parallel-safe) but depend on T015.1 (Generate minor object assets). T015.1 must complete before T015 can load assets from `data/assets/minor_objects/`. Marking T015 as [P] implies it has no dependencies, which is false.

T027 (Recognition question generator) is explicitly blocked by T017 (Metadata generation) and T027.1 (Mock object pool). However, T027 is listed in Phase 4 alongside T025/T026 which are marked [P]. If T027 is part of the same parallel group, the [P] tag is invalid for the group. T027 must be sequenced after T017 and T027.1, not parallelized with them.

T038 (Dataset-variable fit check) is correctly identified as a dependency for T035 (ANOVA). However, T035, T036, and T037 are all marked [P] in the list, implying they can run in parallel. T036 (Correction) and T037 (Visualization) logically depend on the output of T035 (ANOVA results). They cannot be parallelized with T035.

T012 (Power Analysis) is marked as independent, but the plan.md 'Phase 0' states the pipeline 'halts if data/analysis/power_report.json is missing'. T012 produces this file. T035 (ANOVA) and T038 (Fit check) in Phase 5 implicitly depend on the existence of this gate. While T012 is independent of data fetch, the *execution order* of the pipeline requires T012 to complete before Phase 5 tasks can even attempt to run. The [P] tag on T012 is acceptable, but the dependency chain for Phase 5 is missing the explicit link to T012's output artifact.

T006.1 (Dataset Fetcher) and T006.2 (Complexity Score) are marked [P]. T006.2 description says 'Adjust generation parameters... to ensure Q1-Q3 range'. This implies T006.2 consumes the output of T006.1 (the fetched images) to calculate scores. They cannot be truly parallel; T006.2 must wait for T006.1 to produce the image set.
